title: Aluminum cover embodiment for aerosol products
abstract: The invention relates to a metal cover (2) mounted on pressurized metal boxes (1), such as a deodorant box of cosmetic products.
claims: Claims 1. A cosmetic product (A) comprising a pressurized metal box (1) such as a deodorant box, characterized in that, It comprises a cover seating protrusion (1.1) formed on the pressurized metal box (1), The upper part of the pressurized metal box (1), which remains over the cover seating protrusion (1.1), has a diameter decreasing upwardly, It comprises a metal cover (2) including a seating edge (2.1) which sits on the cover seating protrusion (1.1). 2. Cosmetic product (A) according to Claim 1, characterized in that, it comprises a vacuum gap (3) which is formed between the metal cover (2) and the pressurized metal box (1), when the metal cover (2) sits on the cover seating protrusion (1.1) of the pressurized metal box (1). 3. Cosmetic product (A) according to Claim 1, characterized in that, it comprises radius edges (2.2) formed on the upper end of the metal cover (2). 4. Cosmetic product (A) according to Claim 1, characterized in that, said metal cover (2) is made of aluminum material. 5. Cosmetic product (A) according to Claim 1, characterized in that, as the metal cover (2) is made of aluminum material, embossings can optionally be formed on the upper outer surface (2.3) and/or on the upper inner surface (2.4).
